description: A square graphic split into two halves. The top half is a close photograph of a U.S. visa page in a passport, with the large word VISA and a partial photo and printed details visible. The bottom half is a dark navy panel carrying the Department of Homeland Security seal and the wordmark U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services, with yellow text reading You are responsible for following the terms of your visa and white text below reading If you violate them, you can be removed from the U.S.
notable_text: VISA; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; You are responsible for following the terms of your visa; If you violate them, you can be removed from the U.S.
